# Aavre Cabs, Udaipur

> Aavre is a premium electric cab service in Udaipur, Rajasthan. It offers airport transfers, outstation day trips and full day cab hire at fixed prices, with no negotiation and no seasonal surge. Booking is direct on WhatsApp.

Aavre is built on one promise: flat fares you can trust. The fare is agreed before every ride, the same at any hour and any time of year. Cars are fully electric and 5 star safety rated, with 6 airbags, a dashcam and GPS on every ride. Each cab sits up to 4 guests.

## Key facts
- Business name: Aavre Cabs
- Location and base: Udaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Service areas: Udaipur city, Nathdwara, Kumbhalgarh, Chittorgarh, Ranakpur, Rajsamand
- Booking: direct on WhatsApp at +91 94143 43817
- Website: https://aavre.in
- Hours: 06:00 to 23:00, all week, with early and late rides available by pre-booking

## Fares (fixed, no surge, no negotiation)
- Airport transfer within Udaipur city, up to 35 km: 499 rupees
- Udaipur to Nathdwara: 1,200 rupees
- Udaipur to Kumbhalgarh: 2,000 rupees
- Udaipur to Chittorgarh: 2,000 rupees
- Udaipur to Ranakpur: 2,200 rupees
- Half day hire, 5 hours or 100 km: 1,500 rupees
- Full day hire, 10 hours or 180 km: 2,500 rupees
- Custom routes are quoted at a fixed price before you confirm

## Why travellers choose Aavre
- Fixed prices with no surge pricing and no negotiation
- Pre-confirmed bookings, arranged before you travel
- Fully electric fleet, clean and quiet
- 5 star safety rated cars with 6 airbags, dashcam and GPS
- Direct booking on WhatsApp, no app and no middlemen

## Travel guides
- [Udaipur to Chittorgarh by cab](https://aavre.in/blog/udaipur-to-chittorgarh-by-cab.html): distance, drive time and what to see
- [Udaipur to Kumbhalgarh by cab](https://aavre.in/blog/udaipur-to-kumbhalgarh-by-cab.html): the day trip to the Great Wall of India
- [Udaipur airport guide](https://aavre.in/blog/udaipur-airport-guide.html): getting to and from Maharana Pratap Airport
- [Best day trips from Udaipur](https://aavre.in/blog/best-day-trips-from-udaipur.html): outstation options and routes
- [Udaipur travel tips](https://aavre.in/blog/udaipur-travel-tips.html)
- [Udaipur in monsoon](https://aavre.in/blog/udaipur-monsoon-travel-guide.html)
- [All guides](https://aavre.in/blog/index.html)
